name: CHS Rec Center
description: CHS Rec Center is a place to play pickleball in Clintonville, WI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Olen park
description: Olen park is a place to play pickleball in Clintonville, WI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Waupaca High School
description: Waupaca High School is a place to play pickleball in Waupaca, WI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
